title: Business Development Executive
description:
Pickupp is hiring a Business Development Executive to build and grow our business in Singapore. You will be at the forefront ensuring growth and customer satisfaction on our platform.

The right candidate should be comfortable with an “all hands on deck” and fast-paced startup environment where you build from scratch. If you have the tenacity, passion, innovative and collaborative spirit to build this exciting business, come join us!

About The Role:

  • Revenue growth is priority - both hunting for new businesses and farming existing ones
  • Be creative and think of processes to help scale the business
  • Research about organisations and individuals online to identify and generate new leads; understand their needs and move them through acquisition funnel via automation tools and scalable systems
  • Contact potential clients via email and phone to establish rapport, arrange meetings as required to effectively onboard prospective partners, follow-up closely by phone, email, or in person
  • Client management and onboarding; maintain and grow existing client relationships
  • Attend to inbound inquiries
  • Focus on customer success and be the point of contact for key partners
  • Eager to resolve clients’ issues and lead continuous engagements with existing customers
  • Develop processes and account management tools to stay in close communication with clients and incorporate feedback into process improvements
  • Generate reports for key accounts to summarise performance, payments, and other ad hoc matters when necessary
  • Assist with any other administrative and ad-hoc projects where necessary

Requirements:

The ideal candidate is someone who:

  • is driven, motivated, confident and possesses a can-do attitude
  • is relentless in chasing down target numbers
  • has good business acumen and high level of EQ; persistent, sociable, diligent, and detail-oriented
  • is customer-oriented while focused on advancing the company’s interest
  • is willing to go over and above when attending to customer needs 
  • possesses excellent communication and interpersonal skills to independently speak to potential clients
  • has the ability to adapt to and thrive in a quickly evolving and dynamic "day-zero" work environment


Experience in sales optimisation processes is a plus; fresh graduates with the right attitude are welcome to apply.

postedCompany.description:
Pickupp is a data-driven supply chain platform disrupting the logistics industry with its unique network as a service model and smart routing technology. Founded in 2016, the company has operations in Hong Kong, Singapore, Malaysia and Taiwan. The company also recently secured US$37 Million in its latest Series B Funding round and has to-date provided logistics support to 24,000+ businesses spanning MNCs, logistics giants as well as retail and e-commerce. The team has over 100,000 delivery agents across all cities.


Shop On Pickupp is a one-stop e-commerce and food delivery platform that was launched in 2020 to tap on our expertise in delivery services and offer all-rounded payment and tech-enabled delivery solutions for businesses, while providing consumers with unique products and exclusive promotions that come with affordable islandwide delivery fees.
postedCompany.name: PICKUPP PTE. LTD.
